notes: Default whitespace parsing now matches the MMPDB fixture ID behavior.

Default whitespace parsing now matches MMPDB's tab-file ID behavior.
Default whitespace parsing now matches MMPDB's two-tab-file ID behavior.

Explicit has_header=True with delimiter="tab" supports MMPDB's tab header behavior.
Explicit has_header=True with delimiter="comma" supports MMPDB's comma header behavior.
OEMMPA supports configurable maximum-heavy-atom filtering in the fragmenter.
OEMMPA supports configurable maximum-rotatable-bond filtering in the fragmenter.

Current C++ tests cover MMPDB's multi-cut count behavior for explicit alkane cut SMARTS.

OEMMPA's MMPDB-compatible storage now stores 46 rules and 336 pair rows versus MMPDB's 47 and 342; the remaining six-row MW rule-environment delta is classified as canonical aromatic encoding collapse.

Phase 9 will add index filter option parity.
OEMMPA can load properties with molecule records, but database refresh parity remains Phase 9.
